prompts.text: "Palette" — artists use a palette to hold the colours they plan to use. Ask: "Which colours from the palette do you think you'll need?"
Before they pick a colour, ask: "What colour is that part in real life?"
After choosing a colour, say: "You picked [colour] for [part] — tell me why you chose that."
Ask: "Are there colours on the palette you haven't used yet? Where could they go?"
